name: CIMG Inc.
business: CIMG Inc. sells health and wellness products including Maca-based dietary supplements, Homology of Medicine and Food Series (e.g., exosome eye drops), and Computing Power Product Series (GPUs integrated with AI data-processing modules). It distributes through wholesale distributors, grocery stores, convenience stores, vending machines, and online channels. Customers include enterprise clients such as China Merchants Bank.

exposures.sentence: We provide customers with hardware devices, such as GPUs integrated with artificial intelligence data-processing modules.
We source, market, and distribute health and wellness products, including Maca-based dietary supplements, functional foods, and beauty products.

catalysts.event: Exclusive distribution and sales rights for Kangduoyuan brand Maca products in Asia for a three-year term from July 10, 2024 to July 1, 2027.
catalysts.sentence: The agreement has a term from July 10, 2024 to July 1, 2027, and may be terminated by mutual agreement of the parties, with any extension to be agreed in a separately signed agreement.

catalysts.event: Cooperation agreement for omni-channel exclusive sales with Hangzhou Yikang Yimei Health Technology Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On July 10, 2024, Beijing Zhongyan and Hangzhou Yikang Yimei Health Technology Co., Ltd. (Yimei) entered into a cooperation agreement for omni-channel exclusive sales.

catalysts.event: Bid price compliance deadline under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) and Mandatory Panel Monitor through November 14, 2026.
catalysts.sentence: The Company remains subject to a bid price compliance deadline under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) and a Mandatory Panel Monitor through November 14, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global Maca market projected to exceed approximately $100 million by 2035, growing at CAGR >4.2% from 2026 to 2035.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a public report by market research firm Research Nester published on November 19, 2025, the global Maca market is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of more than 4.2% from 2026 to 2035 and to exceed approximately $100 million by 2035.

tamClaims.claim: Global Medicine and Food Homologous Products market expected to grow from $1.07 billion in 2024 to $1.45 billion by 2031, CAGR of 4.5%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a public report released by market research and consulting firm QYResearch on March 2, 2025, the global Medicine and Food Homologous Products market is expected to grow from $1.07 billion in 2024 to $1.45 billion by 2031, representing a CAGR of 4.5% from 2025 to 2031.

tamClaims.claim: Global artificial intelligence hardware market projected to grow from $66.8 billion in 2025 to $296.3 billion in 2034, CAGR of 18%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a public report released by market research and management consulting firm Global Market Insights Inc. in July 2025, the global artificial intelligence hardware market is projected to grow from $66.8 billion in 2025 to $296.3 billion in 2034, representing a CAGR of 18%.
